task_completion.description: Agent verifies the absence of penicillin allergies
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent views the 'Allergies' or 'Medical History' section/widget, showing either 'No data' or a list that does not include Penicillin.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct medication and strength

The patient's medication list is displayed showing 'Amoxicillin' (500mg) as an active medication, or a 'Saved' success notification is visible.
